creator: xmj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 183492
security update

According to Adobe's security bulletin APSB17-17 [1] our flashplayer version 25.0.0.171 is (once more) vulnerable.

Patch attached addresses that.

I have not been able to successfully test it (my setup currently involves firefox and linux c7, that's something that remains to be done.

[1] https://helpx.adobe.com/security/products/flash-player/apsb17-17.html
